calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2026 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories, Set No. One; Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Kathleen Roney And John J. Wasinda, Esq. In The Sum Of $1,925.00; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And [Proposed] Order; Declaration Of Nathaniel Harding, Esq. Filed Separately
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANDRE IRVING's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories, Set No. One; Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Kathleen Roney And John J. Wasinda, Esq. In The Sum Of $1,925.00; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And [Proposed] Order; Declaration Of Nathaniel Harding, Esq. Filed Separately

Plaintiff's unopposed Motion to Compel Further Response to Interrogatories, Set One, et.al. is granted in part and denied in part.

Defendant shall serve supplemental responses to Interrogatories 20.5, 20.6, 20.7, 20.8 and Special Interrogatory 8 within 20 days after service of the order after hearing. Plaintiff's request that further response be compelled to Interrogatory 20.3 is denied; Defendant's previous response constitutes a complete response to this interrogatory. Plaintiff's request for monetary sanctions in the amount of $1925 is granted. Defendant promised during the "meet and confer" between counsel to provide further responses to these interrogatories, yet failed to do so without substantial justification.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2025 Set For Trial On Apr-06-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
